name: No-Bake Peanut Butter-Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, cocoa powder, milk, and butter in a large mixing bowl.
2. Heat the mixture on medium until it comes to a boil.
3. Boil for 1 minute, then remove from heat.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients: salt, vanilla extract, crunchy peanut butter, rolled oats, and coconut flakes.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
6. Allow the cookies to cool completely before serving or storing.
